name: Conversation Agent (ReAct Loop)
description: Full ReAct (Reason-Act-Observe) loop agent with dynamic tool dispatch and post-conversation reflection. The default agentic chat workflow.

recall_context.description: Recall relevant memories and past interactions

think.description: ReAct reasoning step — produce Thought + Action or Final Answer

select_tool.description: Parse the tool name and arguments from the LLM output

observe.description: Format tool output as an observation for the next reasoning step

reflect.description: Extract learnings and facts from the conversation

remember.description: Save extracted learnings to semantic memory

agents.system_prompt: You are a reasoning agent using the ReAct framework. For each step, output Thought + Action or Thought + Final Answer.
You are a reflection specialist. Extract key facts, patterns, and corrections from the conversation for memory storage.
